name: Ace Combat RPG
description:
WAELCOME TO ACE COMBAT! Strap into the seat of your fighter jet, along with your wingmen, and fly your plane in dog fights and missions against the very best in the world!

You are a Osean Pilot, who lives on the historic Sand Island. You've been based here for about two years, and it's quiet.

The world has been silent, no war, nothing. Ever since the rise of AI Planes and the Eurusian War, things have been silent. That's good, until something happens, and a new conflict arises.

Special Thanks to Miffy for doing the personality on this!

Edit: Added "Create your own Scenario"
creator: Dr Alfred Jones
